# No Signature Checklist

## Mandatory rule
No contract, SOW, NDA, MNDA, BAA, amendment, order form, DPA, security appendix, exhibit, or related document may be sent for signature if it contains unresolved Red or Missing Context items.

## Red item checklist
For each Red item, confirm:
- Issue ID
- Contract/document
- Clause reference
- Current wording
- Why this is Red
- Trinetix playbook position
- Proposed fix
- Fallback position, if any
- Business impact
- Legal impact
- Financial impact
- Security/privacy impact
- Approval owner
- Approval evidence
- Final wording checked

## Missing Context checklist
For each Missing Context item, confirm:
- Issue ID
- Contract/document
- Clause reference
- Missing fact
- Why the fact matters
- Person/team who must answer
- Answer received
- Source of answer
- New risk rating after clarification
- Further approval needed
- Final wording checked

## Automatic blockers
The document must not proceed to signature if any of these remain unresolved:
- unlimited or materially increased liability;
- broad or uncapped indemnity;
- IP ownership deviation affecting Background IP, reusable tools, know-how, libraries, methods, accelerators, or unpaid deliverables;
- payment term, set-off, withholding, gross-up, or tax issue without Finance approval;
- vague scope, missing assumptions, missing acceptance criteria, or no change-control mechanism;
- PHI, PII, regulated data, or sensitive data with no appropriate DPA, BAA, or security appendix;
- breach notice, audit, security control, or insurance obligation outside approved capability;
- client policies, procurement terms, online terms, or order forms incorporated without review;
- sanctions, export control, restricted-country, or restricted-party concern;
- non-standard governing law/forum creating material enforcement or cost risk;
- final version not checked after the latest edits.

## Certification language
Use this language only when all blockers are resolved:

“Signature may proceed, subject to normal internal signing authority and final business confirmation.”

Use this language when any blocker remains:

“DO NOT SEND FOR SIGNATURE.”
